name: Pack Of 12 - Wanpy Dog Treats - Sweet Potato Dumbbells 100g

tags.name: Bulk Cat Food & Bulk Dog Food

shortDescription: WANPY Sweet Potato Dumbbells Dog Treats are premium, oven-roasted snacks made with high-quality, human-grade ingredients to deliver a healthy, delicious reward for dogs of all breeds and sizes. Designed to combine taste, nutrition, and safety, these treats are ideal for training, rewarding, or everyday snacking.
description: Crafted with a flavorful sweet potato base, WANPY Sweet Potato Dumbbells offer a naturally sweet taste that dogs love while providing essential nutrients. The oven-roasting process helps retain natural flavors and beneficial nutrients, ensuring a wholesome and satisfying treat experience. Key Features Made with high-quality, human-grade ingredients Oven-roasted for enhanced flavor and nutrition Rich in dietary fiber to support healthy digestion Highly palatable , suitable for picky eaters Non-toxic and safe for dogs of all sizes and breeds Ideal for training, rewards, and daily treats Nutritional Benefits Sweet potato is a natural source of fiber, vitamins, and essential minerals that support digestive health, energy levels, and overall well-being. These treats provide a healthier alternative to conventional dog snacks while maintaining excellent taste and texture. Why Choose WANPY Dog Treats? WANPY is known for producing high-quality pet treats that meet strict safety and quality standards. These sweet potato dumbbells are carefully formulated to ensure consistency, safety, and enjoyment in every bite, making them a trusted choice for pet owners, veterinarians, and pet retailers. Feeding Guidelines Feed as a treat or reward. Ensure your dog has access to fresh drinking water at all times. Not intended to replace a complete and balanced diet.
